title: Mcwarriorxd Pack 16x
description: A Clean 16x PvP Pack That Also Works With Bedwars
body:
No Extract Required! Download And Put In Ur Resource Pack Folder Or Drag And Drop In The Resource Pack Screen In Minecraft:)

HUGE CREDITS TO [Oculie](https://modrinth.com/user/Oculie) for the Low Fire and Low Sheild!

This is an clean 16x pvp texture pack that gives more features than any other pack shorter sword are also included the lightning on the textures are more accurate. the texture pack also takes inspiration from other texture packs it also includes some utility stuff like small totem, low shield, low fire etc it also changes the particles of critical hit this pack works best while playing minigames like Bedwars, Skywars and Fireball Fight etc. However it can also be used while pvping either 1.8 pvp or 1.9 pvp i dont reccomend using this in crystal pvp as it doesnt change texture of obsidian or crystals. sky is also changed. In this, sky does not have any clouds rather it have some stars the color of clouds in day bright, saturated Blue color and in sunrise/sunset its pink which looks good while playing minigames and the texture of sky in night in not black rather its dark, bright blue. Here are the following Textures that were changed/added:

1. Swords
2. Axes
3. Pickaxes
4. Shovels
5. Hoes
6. Spears

Armors:

1. Diamond Armor
2. Gold Armor
3. Netherite Armor
4. Iron Armor
5. Chainmail Armor
6. Leather Armor
7. Copper Armor

Others:

1. Mace
2. Trident
3. Fire Charge
4. Golden Apple
5. Enchanted Golden Apple
6. Shears
7. Ender Pearl
8. Totem Of Undying
9. All Types Of Buckets
10. All Types Of Wool
11. Critical Hit Particles
12. Sky
13. Hotbar (also in inv)

Changed:

1. Bow Now Change Colors Depending on their pulling level (images in gallery)
2. Crossbow Also Changes Color Depending On Their Pulling Level
3. Lower Fire
4. Lower Shield
5. Small Totem Of Undying

And thats pretty much it. i will keep updating this pack until its perfect

Enjoy:)
